name: qb
description: Five-step, goal-backed project planning workflow for Cursor with a repo-aware intake and existing-project assessment: a senior-architect master plan, a Step 1.5 assessment, autonomous phase decomposition, a coverage/quality audit validated by a bundled read-only checker, and a gated implementation step. Produces English planning docs under .qb/. In-session and automatic via the define-goal skill.
